problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
